title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57389 Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory Path

status: experimental
description: |

    product: generic
detection:

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57389 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T06:31:16Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57389", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-57389 Exploitation Attempt - PATHTRAVERSAL"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5775196; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57401 Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory Path 
id: 3c3c92e8-6547-5ca8-9849-00ce55ca23fa
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-57401 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57401
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57401 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T06:31:16Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-57401", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-57401 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2043350; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.9 (Critical); EPSS score 0.382 (elevated exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: PRIORITY PATCH — High severity with confirmed threat activity
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-57400", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57405 Missing Authorization vulnerability in themehunk Open Shop open-s
id: 6eeb5afc-da7e-5286-a303-cab6362d9f70
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-57405 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57405
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-57405 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T06:31:16Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-57405", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
